markdown:
#  Use Bulk Actions > Delete in the Submittals Tool 
##  Background 
Use the Bulk Actions > Delete option when you want to send a batch of submittals to the Recycle Bin.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Submittals tool.
  * **Supported Views** :
    * The Bulk Actions > Delete menu command is supported in the Submittals tool's Items view. It is NOT supported in the Packages, Spec Sections, Ball In Court, or Recycle Bin views. See [Switch Between Submittals Views](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/switch-between-submittals-views).
    * The Recycle Bin supports a Bulk Actions > Retrieve option only. See [Use Bulk Actions > Retrieve in the Submittals Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/use-bulk-actions-retireve-in-the-submittals-tool).
  * **Additional Information** :
    * To use other supported menu commands in the Bulk Actions menu, see [Perform Bulk Actions on Submittals](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/perform-bulk-actions-on-submittals).
    * If you want to bulk edit the submittals that are contained in the same submittal package, follow the steps in [Bulk Edit Submittals in a Package](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/bulk-edit-submittals).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.  
This reveals the Items view of the Submittals page.
  2. Locate the submittals that you want to modify and then:
     * To select all of the submittals in the list, mark the checkbox at the top of the left column.  
OR
     * To select one or more of the submittals in the list, mark the check box to the left of each desired submittal.
  3. Choose **Bulk Actions** > **Delete**.  
This reveals a list of the submittals to be deleted.
  4. Confirm the list of selected submittals on the left. Then click **Delete**.   
A GREEN banner appears to confirm the delete action and the system moves the submittals to the Recycle Bin.


## See Also
  * [Perform Bulk Actions on Submittals](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/perform-bulk-actions-on-submittals)
  * [Delete a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/delete-a-submittal)
  * [Use Bulk Actions > Edit in the Submittals Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/use-bulk-actions-edit-in-the-submittals-tool)
title: Use Bulk Actions > Delete in the Submittals Tool
description: How to use the Bulk Actions menu in the Submittals tool to send a batch of submittals to the Recycle Bin.
